name: German Cabbage Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 dash Each mustard, soy sauce, salt, pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef round, onion, mustard, soy sauce, salt, and pepper; mix thoroughly.
2. Form the mixture into small meatballs.
3. Add wine to the broth and bring to a boil.
4. Add meatballs to the broth one at a time. Bring back to a boil.
5. Cook meatballs for 5 minutes. Remove meatballs from the broth and set aside in a bowl.
6. Add cabbage and tomatoes to the broth. Simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Pour the soup over the meatballs. Garnish with parsley.
